title: [trustless://interop.landscape] Orest Tarasiuk - Cross-chain apps powered by real-time proving
description:
In this talk, Orest Tarasiuk (t1, CTO & Co-founder) does a live demo of xYield, a cross-chain vault optimizer built on t1’s Real-Time Proving based cross-chain application infrastructure. xYield enables yield optimization in the multichain world by automating deposits, withdrawals and bridging across yield sources on multiple chains, based on verifiable strategies proven onchain by TEEs. Orest recaps how t1 solves interop challenges by eliminating the need to switch networks and bridge funds.

Talk given during day 2 of the trustless:// conference at Devconnect Argentina 2025

https://trustlessconference.com
